from abc import ABC, abstractmethod


class Notifier(ABC):
    @abstractmethod
    def send(self, recipient, message):
        pass


class EmailNotifier(Notifier):
    def send(self, recipient, message):
        print(f"Email to {recipient}: {message}")


class SlackNotifier(Notifier):
    def send(self, recipient, message):
        print(f"Slack to {recipient}: {message}")


class EmailWithAttachmentNotifier(EmailNotifier):
    def send(self, recipient, message):
        super().send(recipient, message)
        print(f"Attachment sent to {recipient}")


class EmailWithRetryNotifier(EmailNotifier):
    def send(self, recipient, message):
        for attempt in range(3):
            try:
                super().send(recipient, message)
                return
            except Exception:
                continue


class SlackWithThreadNotifier(SlackNotifier):
    def send(self, recipient, message):
        super().send(recipient, message)
        print(f"Thread created for {recipient}")
